name: sherpacarta
description: Global Digital Magna Carta — 114 articles of digital human rights

tools.name: search_charter
tools.description: Search SherpaCarta charter articles by keyword or article number

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Retrieve a specific charter article by number

tools.name: get_charter_hash
tools.description: Get SHA-256 hash of canonical charter text for OpenTimestamp stamping via Satohash

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List all charter articles with titles and chapters
